def negative_runtime_data_file_assumption_in_implicit_namespace_package():
    rule_id = "runtime_data_file_assumption_in_implicit_namespace_package"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag implicit namespace packages that assume local data-file discovery at runtime."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
